prompt: Create an ast-grep YAML rule to find all methods in the file evals/files/search-sample.ts that use `.subscribe()` calls (RxJS pattern). Write the rule, save it to a file, and run it with ast-grep scan. Show the output.

assertions.text: Creates a valid YAML rule file
The rule uses relational rules (has/inside) or pattern
Runs ast-grep scan with the rule file
The output correctly identifies subscribe calls in the file
